title: Ubiquiti UCG-Ultra, UniFi Cloud Gateway Ultra
description: UCG-Ultra is a all-round device from the UniFi Cloud Gateway series. The router has (1) WAN 1/2.5Gbps port and (4) LAN 1Gbps ports (1 with LAN/WAN configuration option). The compact and powerful device thus supports the multi-WAN function, including the option of load balancing, and also supports IDS/IPS . The router has implemented support for various types of VPN , including site-to-site VPN Using the integrated UniFi Network App you can manage up to 30+ UniFi devices and serve up to 300+ connected client devices. There is a 0.96-inch status display. Power is provided via the USB-C connector, the power adapter is included in the package 1Gbps routing with IDS/IPS support Integrated UniFi Network App Multi-WAN + load balancing 0.96" LCM display USB-C power Device Patch cable USB-C power adapter (5V/3A)
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces WAN Ports 1 WAN speed (1) 100/1000/2500Mbps Multiple WAN Yes LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps + (3) 10/100/1000Mbps LAN/WAN Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power type USB-C Max. power consumption [W] 6,2 Power via connector/terminal 5V / 3A Physical characteristics Design Desktop Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 40 Width [mm] 142 Height [mm] 30 Depth [mm] 128 Hardware RAM [MB] 3072 General NAT throughput [Mb/s] 1000
